TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Parod, title = Parod, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Parod} }

S.FORM: == O paror no pangcah == Itiya ho patireng ko pangcah to loma' . Misafaloco' to saka tanektekaw . Ta caay ka loyoh no faliyos . Samasa mifadahong sato cangra . sapoener han nangra a misanga' . Nikaorira . o laloma' saan .masakakahad tono aniniay a loma' . Ano mifadic to fadahong . saheto o eli' . o patih saan o mitolikan to 'awel . Oya hecek no laloma' i. ira ko mito'to'an a coka to saka ening a ma'araw . O takar saan o mitolikan to penen ato 'oway . Onian ko saka caay ka soemet . I laloma' saan . ira ko kafoti'an . o pihololan ato pisafelan a paror . O roma sato . ira ko laosidan . sikal oray riko'polong no caca'edongen . o kakaenen ato losid no sakalingad . Maemin malina'ec i laloma' . Caay to ka lalen tono aniniay ko rawang no loma'. ira ko kofaw ato 'ariri . Ora paror i laloma' i . o pisafelan ato pingiroan . Itini a malaholol ko polong paro no loma' . Hatatiya i laloma' a misafel ko pangcah . nikaorira .marocekay ko lodis nangra to sapitangtang . Ano mitapay mikesir to . misafel ato mitamek . mangaayay kiya sa o . Ora falah no paror . cowa ka padeng . Kasienawan sato . malaholo cangra a misi'ayaw toya paror . mingro .Itini cangra a masasowal to demak no laloma'an . Ora paror i laloma' . saci 'acofel saan a masaromi'ami'ad . caay ka 'olaw ko patih no laloma' hakiya? caay ka pakacorah hakiya? Sanay ko rihanaw9 no harateng . O katengilan to sowal no mato'asay tonini. Ano pararir a mada'at no 'acofel ko laloma'an . 'olaw sato ko patihpatih hananay .o marocekay kona loma' sanay kira .Matiya irayay ko mato'asay nangra a pacafay cangraanan . Ano sakongkong asa ko loma' i. matiya to o kahiceraan no cimacima a kawas sanay ko patinako to sowal . Ora falah no lamal i . o karihanawan to ko pakacorah . Itini saca i kaliomahan . Matatood ko paro no loma' a malingad . na'onen nangra a mipadeng kora langto no lamal .Minokay sato a misakalafi . Tayra i fiyafiyaw a mitotong tosalikat a misafel . Ano caay paka hadidi ko wawa to cahiw .Itini a mitamek to konga cangra to sa pacoma to kaemangay . I'ayaw o 'orip no pangcah . polong sanay ko kaciloma'no kasalomaloma' . Matapal ko ka samaanmaan no paro no loma' . Ano malalikel to kafoti'an . Onini ya cahoay ka ciramor ko mingataay to safawahan . Cangra ko cacitodong to mamaocor a matayal . Mingataay tora paror i . o mama ato wina no laloma'an . ato dadipoten a kaemangay . ya i salaloma'ay ci'ici'iwananay . o samato'asay nangra . Ano sali'si' ko sienaw . Patodongen nangra ko mato'asay to paror to sapingiro . Hatiniay ko loma' no pangcah hananay . Uruma a suwal nu 'Amis tu "parur" hananay i, pakayniay i aru' nu luma', pasuwalsa, "Fangcalay parur, kanca tatiihay parar saan ku caciyaw nu pangcah. Uruma satu, anu mamikadafu ku fa'inayan a wawa, u faki nu luma' caka eca pipatafu tu sasuwalen "xxx anu tayra tu kisu pikadafuan i, aka kapidah, aka katuka, sa'icelen a mipatireng ku (PARUR) nu pikadafuan isu" saan ku palimu'ut tu mamikadafu. Masa Parur ku aru', fangcal ku pising saki widang atu salikaka nu tireng i tatapangan nu talengawan.Saka, pitu:sur saan ku fa'inayan a matayal i pikadafuan.
S.PHON: == o~u paro~ur no~u paŇč ¶ańß == itija ńßo~u patir…ôŇč ko~u paŇč ¶ańß to~u …ĺo~uma ° . misafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° to~u saka tan…ôkt…ôkaw . ta ¶aaj ka …ĺo~ujo~uńß no~u fa…ĺijo~us . samasa mifa…¨~…ģańßo~uŇč sato~u ¶aŇčra . sapo~u…ôn…ôr ńßan naŇčra a misaŇča ° . nikao~urira . o~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° saan .masakakańßa…¨~…ģ to~uno~u aniniaj a …ĺo~uma ° . ano~u mifa…¨~…ģi ¶ to~u fa…¨~…ģańßo~uŇč . sańß…ôto~u o~u …ô…ĺi ° . o~u patińß saan o~u mito~u…ĺikan to~u °aw…ô…ĺ . o~uja ńß…ô ¶…ôk no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° i. ira ko~u mito~u °to~u °an a ¶o~uka to~u saka …ôniŇč a ma °araw . o~u takar saan o~u mito~u…ĺikan to~u p…ôn…ôn ato~u °o~uwaj . o~unian ko~u saka ¶aaj ka so~u…ôm…ôt . i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° saan . ira ko~u kafo~uti °an . o~u pińßo~u…ĺo~u…ĺan ato~u pisaf…ô…ĺan a paro~ur . o~u ro~uma sato~u . ira ko~u …ĺao~usi…¨~…ģan . sika…ĺ o~uraj riko~u °po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u ¶a ¶a °…ô…¨~…ģo~uŇč…ôn . o~u kaka…ôn…ôn ato~u …ĺo~usi…¨~…ģ no~u saka…ĺiŇča…¨~…ģ . ma…ômin ma…ĺina °…ô ¶ i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° . ¶aaj to~u ka …ĺa…ĺ…ôn to~uno~u aniniaj ko~u rawaŇč no~u …ĺo~uma °. ira ko~u ko~ufaw ato~u °ariri . o~ura paro~ur i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° i . o~u pisaf…ô…ĺan ato~u piŇčiro~uan . itini a ma…ĺańßo~u…ĺo~u…ĺ ko~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° . ńßatatija i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° a misaf…ô…ĺ ko~u paŇč ¶ańß . nikao~urira .maro~u ¶…ôkaj ko~u …ĺo~u…¨~…ģis naŇčra to~u sapitaŇčtaŇč . ano~u mitapaj mik…ôsir to~u . misaf…ô…ĺ ato~u mitam…ôk . maŇčaajaj kija sa o~u . o~ura fa…ĺańß no~u paro~ur . ¶o~uwa ka pa…¨~…ģ…ôŇč . kasi…ônawan sato~u . ma…ĺańßo~u…ĺo~u ¶aŇčra a misi °ajaw to~uja paro~ur . miŇčro~u .itini ¶aŇčra a masaso~uwa…ĺ to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an . o~ura paro~ur i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° . sa ¶i °a ¶o~uf…ô…ĺ saan a masaro~umi °ami °a…¨~…ģ . ¶aaj ka °o~u…ĺaw ko~u patińß no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° ńßakija? ¶aaj ka paka ¶o~urańß ńßakija? sanaj ko~u rińßanaw* no~u ńßarat…ôŇč . o~u kat…ôŇči…ĺan to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mato~u °asaj to~unini. ano~u pararir a ma…¨~…ģa °at no~u °a ¶o~uf…ô…ĺ ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an . °o~u…ĺaw sato~u ko~u patińßpatińß ńßananaj .o~u maro~u ¶…ôkaj ko~una …ĺo~uma ° sanaj kira .matija irajaj ko~u mato~u °asaj naŇčra a pa ¶afaj ¶aŇčraanan . ano~u sako~uŇčko~uŇč asa ko~u …ĺo~uma ° i. matija to~u o~u kańßi ¶…ôraan no~u ¶ima ¶ima a kawas sanaj ko~u patinako~u to~u so~uwa…ĺ . o~ura fa…ĺańß no~u …ĺama…ĺ i . o~u karińßanawan to~u ko~u paka ¶o~urańß . itini sa ¶a i ka…ĺio~umańßan . matato~uo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° a ma…ĺiŇča…¨~…ģ . na °o~un…ôn naŇčra a mipa…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ko~ura …ĺaŇčto~u no~u …ĺama…ĺ .mino~ukaj sato~u a misaka…ĺafi . tajra i fijafijaw a mito~uto~uŇč to~usa…ĺikat a misaf…ô…ĺ . ano~u ¶aaj paka ńßa…¨~…ģi…¨~…ģi ko~u wawa to~u ¶ańßiw .itini a mitam…ôk to~u ko~uŇča ¶aŇčra to~u sa pa ¶o~uma to~u ka…ômaŇčaj . i °ajaw o~u °o~urip no~u paŇč ¶ańß . po~u…ĺo~uŇč sanaj ko~u ka ¶i…ĺo~uma °no~u kasa…ĺo~uma…ĺo~uma ° . matapa…ĺ ko~u ka samaanmaan no~u paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° . ano~u ma…ĺa…ĺik…ô…ĺ to~u kafo~uti °an . o~unini ja ¶ańßo~uaj ka ¶iramo~ur ko~u miŇčataaj to~u safawańßan . ¶aŇčra ko~u ¶a ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u mamao~u ¶o~ur a mataja…ĺ . miŇčataaj to~ura paro~ur i . o~u mama ato~u wina no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an . ato~u …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģipo~ut…ôn a ka…ômaŇčaj . ja i sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj ¶i °i ¶i °iwananaj . o~u samato~u °asaj naŇčra . ano~u sa…ĺi °si ° ko~u si…ônaw . pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč…ôn naŇčra ko~u mato~u °asaj to~u paro~ur to~u sapiŇčiro~u . ńßatiniaj ko~u …ĺo~uma ° no~u paŇč ¶ańß ńßananaj . o~u~uro~u~uma a so~u~uwa…ĺ no~u~u °amis to~u~u "paro~u~ur" ńßananaj i, pakajniaj i aro~u~u ° no~u~u …ĺo~u~uma °, paso~u~uwa…ĺsa, "faŇč ¶a…ĺaj paro~u~ur, kan ¶a tatiińßaj parar saan ko~u~u ¶a ¶ijaw no~u~u paŇč ¶ańß. o~u~uro~u~uma sato~u~u, ano~u~u mamika…¨~…ģafo~u~u ko~u~u fa °inajan a wawa, o~u~u faki no~u~u …ĺo~u~uma ° ¶aka …ô ¶a pipatafo~u~u to~u~u saso~u~uwa…ĺ…ôn "xxx ano~u~u tajra to~u~u kiso~u~u pika…¨~…ģafo~u~uan i, aka kapi…¨~…ģańß, aka kato~u~uka, sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ…ôn a mipatir…ôŇč ko~u~u (paro~u~ur) no~u~u pika…¨~…ģafo~u~uan iso~u~u" saan ko~u~u pa…ĺimo~u~u °o~u~ut to~u~u mamika…¨~…ģafo~u~u. masa paro~u~ur ko~u~u aro~u~u °, faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u~u pisiŇč saki wi…¨~…ģaŇč ato~u~u sa…ĺikaka no~u~u tir…ôŇč i tatapaŇčan no~u~u ta…ĺ…ôŇčawan.saka, pito~u~u:so~u~ur saan ko~u~u fa °inajan a mataja…ĺ i pika…¨~…ģafo~u~uan.
S.FORM: == O paror no pangcah == Itiya ho patireng ko pangcah to loma' . Misafaloco' to saka tanektekaw . Ta caay ka loyoh no faliyos . Samasa mifadahong sato cangra . sapoener han nangra a misanga' . Nikaorira . o laloma' saan .masakakahad tono aniniay a loma' . Ano mifadic to fadahong . saheto o eli' . o patih saan o mitolikan to 'awel . Oya hecek no laloma' i. ira ko mito'to'an a coka to saka ening a ma'araw . O takar saan o mitolikan to penen ato 'oway . Onian ko saka caay ka soemet . I laloma' saan . ira ko kafoti'an . o pihololan ato pisafelan a paror . O roma sato . ira ko laosidan . sikal oray riko'polong no caca'edongen . o kakaenen ato losid no sakalingad . Maemin malina'ec i laloma' . Caay to ka lalen tono aniniay ko rawang no loma'. ira ko kofaw ato 'ariri . Ora paror i laloma' i . o pisafelan ato pingiroan . Itini a malaholol ko polong paro no loma' . Hatatiya i laloma' a misafel ko pangcah . nikaorira .marocekay ko lodis nangra to sapitangtang . Ano mitapay mikesir to . misafel ato mitamek . mangaayay kiya sa o . Ora falah no paror . cowa ka padeng . Kasienawan sato . malaholo cangra a misi'ayaw toya paror . mingro .Itini cangra a masasowal to demak no laloma'an . Ora paror i laloma' . saci 'acofel saan a masaromi'ami'ad . caay ka 'olaw ko patih no laloma' hakiya? caay ka pakacorah hakiya? Sanay ko rihanaw9 no harateng . O katengilan to sowal no mato'asay tonini. Ano pararir a mada'at no 'acofel ko laloma'an . 'olaw sato ko patihpatih hananay .o marocekay kona loma' sanay kira .Matiya irayay ko mato'asay nangra a pacafay cangraanan . Ano sakongkong asa ko loma' i. matiya to o kahiceraan no cimacima a kawas sanay ko patinako to sowal . Ora falah no lamal i . o karihanawan to ko pakacorah . Itini saca i kaliomahan . Matatood ko paro no loma' a malingad . na'onen nangra a mipadeng kora langto no lamal .Minokay sato a misakalafi . Tayra i fiyafiyaw a mitotong tosalikat a misafel . Ano caay paka hadidi ko wawa to cahiw .Itini a mitamek to konga cangra to sa pacoma to kaemangay . I'ayaw o 'orip no pangcah . polong sanay ko kaciloma'no kasalomaloma' . Matapal ko ka samaanmaan no paro no loma' . Ano malalikel to kafoti'an . Onini ya cahoay ka ciramor ko mingataay to safawahan . Cangra ko cacitodong to mamaocor a matayal . Mingataay tora paror i . o mama ato wina no laloma'an . ato dadipoten a kaemangay . ya i salaloma'ay ci'ici'iwananay . o samato'asay nangra . Ano sali'si' ko sienaw . Patodongen nangra ko mato'asay to paror to sapingiro . Hatiniay ko loma' no pangcah hananay . Uruma a suwal nu 'Amis tu "parur" hananay i, pakayniay i aru' nu luma', pasuwalsa, "Fangcalay parur, kanca tatiihay parar saan ku caciyaw nu pangcah. Uruma satu, anu mamikadafu ku fa'inayan a wawa, u faki nu luma' caka eca pipatafu tu sasuwalen "xxx anu tayra tu kisu pikadafuan i, aka kapidah, aka katuka, sa'icelen a mipatireng ku (PARUR) nu pikadafuan isu" saan ku palimu'ut tu mamikadafu. Masa Parur ku aru', fangcal ku pising saki widang atu salikaka nu tireng i tatapangan nu talengawan.Saka, pitu:sur saan ku fa'inayan a matayal i pikadafuan.
S.PHON: == o~u paro~ur no~u paŇč ¶ańß == itija ńßo~u patir…ôŇč ko~u paŇč ¶ańß to~u …ĺo~uma ° . misafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° to~u saka tan…ôkt…ôkaw . ta ¶aaj ka …ĺo~ujo~uńß no~u fa…ĺijo~us . samasa mifa…¨~…ģańßo~uŇč sato~u ¶aŇčra . sapo~u…ôn…ôr ńßan naŇčra a misaŇča ° . nikao~urira . o~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° saan .masakakańßa…¨~…ģ to~uno~u aniniaj a …ĺo~uma ° . ano~u mifa…¨~…ģi ¶ to~u fa…¨~…ģańßo~uŇč . sańß…ôto~u o~u …ô…ĺi ° . o~u patińß saan o~u mito~u…ĺikan to~u °aw…ô…ĺ . o~uja ńß…ô ¶…ôk no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° i. ira ko~u mito~u °to~u °an a ¶o~uka to~u saka …ôniŇč a ma °araw . o~u takar saan o~u mito~u…ĺikan to~u p…ôn…ôn ato~u °o~uwaj . o~unian ko~u saka ¶aaj ka so~u…ôm…ôt . i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° saan . ira ko~u kafo~uti °an . o~u pińßo~u…ĺo~u…ĺan ato~u pisaf…ô…ĺan a paro~ur . o~u ro~uma sato~u . ira ko~u …ĺao~usi…¨~…ģan . sika…ĺ o~uraj riko~u °po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u ¶a ¶a °…ô…¨~…ģo~uŇč…ôn . o~u kaka…ôn…ôn ato~u …ĺo~usi…¨~…ģ no~u saka…ĺiŇča…¨~…ģ . ma…ômin ma…ĺina °…ô ¶ i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° . ¶aaj to~u ka …ĺa…ĺ…ôn to~uno~u aniniaj ko~u rawaŇč no~u …ĺo~uma °. ira ko~u ko~ufaw ato~u °ariri . o~ura paro~ur i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° i . o~u pisaf…ô…ĺan ato~u piŇčiro~uan . itini a ma…ĺańßo~u…ĺo~u…ĺ ko~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° . ńßatatija i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° a misaf…ô…ĺ ko~u paŇč ¶ańß . nikao~urira .maro~u ¶…ôkaj ko~u …ĺo~u…¨~…ģis naŇčra to~u sapitaŇčtaŇč . ano~u mitapaj mik…ôsir to~u . misaf…ô…ĺ ato~u mitam…ôk . maŇčaajaj kija sa o~u . o~ura fa…ĺańß no~u paro~ur . ¶o~uwa ka pa…¨~…ģ…ôŇč . kasi…ônawan sato~u . ma…ĺańßo~u…ĺo~u ¶aŇčra a misi °ajaw to~uja paro~ur . miŇčro~u .itini ¶aŇčra a masaso~uwa…ĺ to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an . o~ura paro~ur i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° . sa ¶i °a ¶o~uf…ô…ĺ saan a masaro~umi °ami °a…¨~…ģ . ¶aaj ka °o~u…ĺaw ko~u patińß no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° ńßakija? ¶aaj ka paka ¶o~urańß ńßakija? sanaj ko~u rińßanaw* no~u ńßarat…ôŇč . o~u kat…ôŇči…ĺan to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mato~u °asaj to~unini. ano~u pararir a ma…¨~…ģa °at no~u °a ¶o~uf…ô…ĺ ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an . °o~u…ĺaw sato~u ko~u patińßpatińß ńßananaj .o~u maro~u ¶…ôkaj ko~una …ĺo~uma ° sanaj kira .matija irajaj ko~u mato~u °asaj naŇčra a pa ¶afaj ¶aŇčraanan . ano~u sako~uŇčko~uŇč asa ko~u …ĺo~uma ° i. matija to~u o~u kańßi ¶…ôraan no~u ¶ima ¶ima a kawas sanaj ko~u patinako~u to~u so~uwa…ĺ . o~ura fa…ĺańß no~u …ĺama…ĺ i . o~u karińßanawan to~u ko~u paka ¶o~urańß . itini sa ¶a i ka…ĺio~umańßan . matato~uo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° a ma…ĺiŇča…¨~…ģ . na °o~un…ôn naŇčra a mipa…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ko~ura …ĺaŇčto~u no~u …ĺama…ĺ .mino~ukaj sato~u a misaka…ĺafi . tajra i fijafijaw a mito~uto~uŇč to~usa…ĺikat a misaf…ô…ĺ . ano~u ¶aaj paka ńßa…¨~…ģi…¨~…ģi ko~u wawa to~u ¶ańßiw .itini a mitam…ôk to~u ko~uŇča ¶aŇčra to~u sa pa ¶o~uma to~u ka…ômaŇčaj . i °ajaw o~u °o~urip no~u paŇč ¶ańß . po~u…ĺo~uŇč sanaj ko~u ka ¶i…ĺo~uma °no~u kasa…ĺo~uma…ĺo~uma ° . matapa…ĺ ko~u ka samaanmaan no~u paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° . ano~u ma…ĺa…ĺik…ô…ĺ to~u kafo~uti °an . o~unini ja ¶ańßo~uaj ka ¶iramo~ur ko~u miŇčataaj to~u safawańßan . ¶aŇčra ko~u ¶a ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u mamao~u ¶o~ur a mataja…ĺ . miŇčataaj to~ura paro~ur i . o~u mama ato~u wina no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an . ato~u …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģipo~ut…ôn a ka…ômaŇčaj . ja i sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj ¶i °i ¶i °iwananaj . o~u samato~u °asaj naŇčra . ano~u sa…ĺi °si ° ko~u si…ônaw . pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč…ôn naŇčra ko~u mato~u °asaj to~u paro~ur to~u sapiŇčiro~u . ńßatiniaj ko~u …ĺo~uma ° no~u paŇč ¶ańß ńßananaj . o~u~uro~u~uma a so~u~uwa…ĺ no~u~u °amis to~u~u "paro~u~ur" ńßananaj i, pakajniaj i aro~u~u ° no~u~u …ĺo~u~uma °, paso~u~uwa…ĺsa, "faŇč ¶a…ĺaj paro~u~ur, kan ¶a tatiińßaj parar saan ko~u~u ¶a ¶ijaw no~u~u paŇč ¶ańß. o~u~uro~u~uma sato~u~u, ano~u~u mamika…¨~…ģafo~u~u ko~u~u fa °inajan a wawa, o~u~u faki no~u~u …ĺo~u~uma ° ¶aka …ô ¶a pipatafo~u~u to~u~u saso~u~uwa…ĺ…ôn "xxx ano~u~u tajra to~u~u kiso~u~u pika…¨~…ģafo~u~uan i, aka kapi…¨~…ģańß, aka kato~u~uka, sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ…ôn a mipatir…ôŇč ko~u~u (paro~u~ur) no~u~u pika…¨~…ģafo~u~uan iso~u~u" saan ko~u~u pa…ĺimo~u~u °o~u~ut to~u~u mamika…¨~…ģafo~u~u. masa paro~u~ur ko~u~u aro~u~u °, faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u~u pisiŇč saki wi…¨~…ģaŇč ato~u~u sa…ĺikaka no~u~u tir…ôŇč i tatapaŇčan no~u~u ta…ĺ…ôŇčawan.saka, pito~u~u:so~u~ur saan ko~u~u fa °inajan a mataja…ĺ i pika…¨~…ģafo~u~uan.
